It seems like you're attempting to branch too many kinds of Units in one Team so that you don't have something to specialize in for maximum effiency, I personally recommend focusing on either Faros / Xu or Doresain Xu
In a Comp with Doresain, he typically wants to be the Main Carry DPS (or act as the Strength Generator / Stealer for somebody else to act as the Damage Dealer) and have (other) dedicated Supports

On the other hand, in a Team with Xu you can either shelve her into a Supporting Role where you use her as an Exalt Bot to grant 3 additional Arithmatecia / apply Strength Down (including 2 - Cost Skill) and generate Embryo Fusion

Or focus on her as the main DPS via Poison, but she'll need somebody else to apply Poison for her so that she can simply focus on dealing Damage and applying "Spellbound" on Enemies via "Resonance, her Sig Posse Skill and her Exalt via Devour"
Supports: Thais, Pickman, Clementine, Horla, Salvador, Aigis, Faint, Ramona
Supports: GDoll, Lily, Nymphea, Thais, Agrippa, Salvador, Faint, Liz, Faros, Myriam, Murphy, Ramona
There's probably more possible combinations, but these are what I remember being commonly run
Do what you will with all this information
